Container.Name: smoker-app
Container.Overview: BBQ Smoker Tracker — track and analyze smoking sessions with real-time temperature monitoring from ESPHome probes via Home Assistant and InfluxDB.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the Smoker Tracker web interface.

Config.Name: InfluxDB URL
Config.Description: Full URL of your InfluxDB v2 instance. Use the LAN IP of your Unraid server, not localhost.

Config.Name: InfluxDB Token
Config.Description: InfluxDB v2 authentication token. Find this in InfluxDB UI under Data → Tokens.

Config.Name: InfluxDB Bucket
Config.Description: InfluxDB bucket where smoker data is stored.

Config.Name: Home Assistant URL
Config.Description: URL of your Home Assistant instance. Optional — reserved for future use.

Config.Name: Home Assistant Token
Config.Description: Home Assistant long-lived access token. Optional — reserved for future use.
